files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections from the September Guide Lessons. Lesson I is a full detailed lesson on Blessings, Lesson II is just a header with no content, Lesson III is a brief reference to a previously published lesson, and Lesson VII (labeled as VI] in the text) is a substantial lesson on Moral Leadership in the Home with questions and teacher topics.
